title: Tantt
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tantt''' were a tribe of [[Human/Legends|Humans]] native to [[Thracior]]. They objected to their people [[Marriage/Legends|marrying]] members of other tribes such as the [[Hnsi]]. If done, it usually ended in the [[Death/Legends|death]] of the whole family. [[Floria]] and [[Dane (bounty hunter)|Dane]] were members of the Tantt.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi]]'' {{Ab|Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi (audiobook)}}

==Sources==
